title: CSS Layout & Styling
summary: Flexbox, positioning, responsive units, and common layout patterns.

examples.title: Flexbox row
examples.description: display flex aligns items in a row with gap.

examples.title: CSS Grid
examples.description: grid-template-columns creates a responsive card layout.

examples.title: Responsive page with navbar and sidebar
examples.description: Purpose: Most websites use a top navbar plus a side menu and main content; on phones the layout should stack so nothing is too narrow. Output: A dark top nav, blue sidebar links, and a main area—on small screens the sidebar moves above the content. Try: Resize your browser window to see the layout change.
